title: xebench findings
description: Narrative findings published by xebench as data. Consumers (e.g. the pocketpal.dev leaderboard callouts) MUST render 'headline', 'deck', and 'claims' verbatim and MUST NOT re-word them — a claim is a lab statement, not editorial copy. Bump schemaVersion on any breaking field change.

kind.description: gap = a capability that can't be reproduced; contrast = A-vs-B; result = a measured takeaway; caveat = a methodology note

blocks.description: for a 'gap' finding: the coverage cell(s) this finding explains, so a devices×engines grid can mark them 'blocked → see finding' without hand-mapping. Match on engine+backend (optionally a specific device).

engine.description: matches an EngineBenchmarkRow engine id, e.g. 'litert-lm'

device.description: optional: restrict the block to one device; omit = the whole engine×backend path

deck.description: one-line summary under the headline — render verbatim

claims.description: ordered claim sentences — render verbatim, never re-worded; each is a lab statement

steps.description: an optional pass/fail strip (e.g. the LiteRT stack: loads OK / skel present OK / bridge libs MISSING)

resolution.description: what would close the gap — render verbatim

context.description: structured facts behind the finding (device, soc, versions, lib names) so the UI can surface them as chips without parsing prose

verifiedAt.description: YYYY-MM-DD the finding was last verified on device
